title: REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH - 211info
text: NARA NW INDIAN HEALTH CLINIC REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general clinic health services, including physical exams, treatment of minor injuries, immunizations, well baby/child clinics, nutrition counseling, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing, education and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 703 NE Hancock Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Native American or Alaskan Native Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (503) 230-9875 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 230-9875 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: Native American ID card, photo ID, birth certificate if direct descendent of enrolled Native American LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling * Native American Community Breast Examinations * Native American Community HIV Testing * Native American Community HPV Immunizations * Native American Community Pap Tests * Native American Community Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Native American Community Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NARA NW INDIAN HEALTH CLINIC
